---
title: "Reticulate Examples"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date())`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

Overview

This folder groups the R/Python interoperability materials built with `reticulate`. The rendered example below is available under `../../examples/reticulate/`.

Examples

- [Invoke Python from R with Reticulate](../../examples/reticulate/02-invoke-reticulate.md) - Exchange data and function calls between R and Python.
